page.title: Scouting
page.subtitle: Economic-threshold IPM scouting + a cert-gated, PHI/REI-safe spray log

board.scoutingHeading: Scouting — {countLabel} {count, plural, one {plot} other {plots}} over threshold
board.logSprayHint: A spray is blocked at the data layer unless the applicator holds a valid pesticide-handling cert and the PHI/REI windows are respected.

phiChips.emptyDescription: Every plot is clear to pick and safe to enter — no spray interval is currently open.

scoutingBoard.emptyDescription: Log a broca or roya scouting read and the economic-threshold engine surfaces a recommend-or-hold call here — and fires a control task when it crosses.
scoutingBoard.controlTaskFired: Control task fired to the board
scoutingBoard.belowThreshold: Below threshold — monitoring, no intervention warranted.

sprayHistory.emptyDescription: A spray can only be logged by a certified applicator — once one is, it appears here immutably with its PHI/REI windows.

sprayForm.noCertWarning: No crew member holds a valid pesticide-handling cert — a spray cannot be logged until someone is certified.
sprayForm.errorNotCertified: {name} does not hold a valid pesticide-handling certification — the spray cannot be logged.
sprayForm.errorCouldNotLog: The spray could not be logged.
sprayForm.errorUnreachable: Could not reach the log — check your connection and retry.
sprayForm.success: Spray logged — PHI/REI windows stamped; the planner will respect them.
